What We Do
OUR CAPABILITIES

From raw steel to finished structure — every stage handled in-house with precision, speed, and uncompromising quality.

01
🚪

Ornamental Steel Gates

Custom-designed ornamental and laser-cut steel gates with decorative patterns, gold/brass accents, and premium finishes.

02
⚙️

CNC Laser Cutting

High-precision CNC laser cutting for decorative decors, complex profiles, and intricate patterns in steel and stainless.

03
🪜

Steel & Stainless Stairs

Bespoke staircases in mild steel, stainless steel, and brass finish — straight, spiral, or curved to any design.

04
🛤️

Steel Ramps

Heavy-duty steel access ramps built to specification — safe, durable, and code-compliant for any application.

05
🔒

Handrails & Glass Rails

Steel handrails, glass balustrades, I-beam stages, emergency doors — all structural rail and balcony solutions.

06
🏗️

Steel Structures

All types of steel structures — frames, trusses, pergolas, canopies, and industrial frameworks of any scale.

07
🪞

Interior Steel Fit-out

Custom steel furniture, shelving units, display racks, kitchen frames, and bespoke interior metalwork.

08
✨

Brass & Stainless Finish

Premium stainless steel and brass finish work — mirrors, polished panels, decorative trims, and accent pieces.

Why Choose AZC
PRECISION YOU CAN TRUST

Based in Riyadh's Al-Sadah Industrial Area, Awan Al-Zahabia Contracting has delivered hundreds of steel fabrication projects across Saudi Arabia — from grand ornamental gates to complex structural steel for major commercial developments.

💬 WhatsApp Us Now

End-to-End Fabrication

Everything in-house — cutting, bending, welding, and finishing — no delays, no middlemen.

Advanced CNC Equipment

Modern CNC laser machinery for consistent, repeatable precision at any batch size.

Fast Turnaround

Streamlined workflow built for on-time delivery. Saturday to Thursday, 7AM–6PM.

Nationwide Projects

Fabrication delivered to project sites across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

How It Works
OUR PROCESS
1

Consultation

Share your drawings, specs, and requirements with our team via WhatsApp or email.

2

Quotation

Receive a detailed, transparent quote with timeline and pricing — fast turnaround.

3

Fabrication

Precision CNC cutting, bending, welding, and finishing by experienced operators.

4

QC & Delivery

Every piece inspected before delivery to your project site anywhere in KSA.
